hero.title: We Automate Business Processes
hero.titleHighlight: so you can focus on growth
hero.subtitle: CRM/ERP integrations, document workflow automation, chatbots and custom software development for small and medium businesses in Ukraine.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for your business digitalization

crm.title: CRM/ERP Integrations
crm.description: Setup and integration of Bitrix24, SAP, and other platforms tailored to your unique business processes.

edi.title: Document Workflow Automation
edi.description: Electronic document management, EDI, e-invoicing and automatic report generation between counterparties.

bots.title: Chatbots & AI Assistants
bots.description: Development of Telegram/Viber bots and AI assistants to automate customer communications.

custom.title: Custom Software Development
custom.description: Development of individual software solutions — from MVP to a full-scale platform.

web.title: Web Applications
web.description: Refinement, refactoring and scaling of existing web systems and business portals.

dashboard.title: Your Business Under Control
dashboard.subtitle: Centralized management panel for all integrations and processes

cta.title: Ready to Automate Your Business?
cta.subtitle: Get a free consultation and discover how we can help your company reach the next level.

about.pageSubtitle: We help businesses grow through technology

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: ArtLogic was founded in 2018 by a team of engineers with extensive experience in large corporate systems. We saw that small and medium-sized businesses in Ukraine needed the same automation tools as large corporations — but at accessible prices.
story.p2: Today we help companies across Ukraine implement smart solutions: from simple integrations to complex business platforms. Our goal is to make your company more efficient and free you from routine tasks.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Your business can't stop — our solutions work 24/7 and are supported at any time.

clarity.title: Transparency
clarity.desc: Clear cooperation terms, understandable reports and open communication at every project stage.

growth.title: Growth
growth.desc: We scale solutions together with your business growth — from startup to large enterprise.

local.title: Local Expertise
local.desc: Deep understanding of Ukrainian market specifics, legislation and business environment.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Experienced specialists who understand your business

timeline.title: How We Grew
timeline.2018: Company founded. First clients — small businesses in Kyiv.
timeline.2019: Launch of CRM integration division. Partnership with Bitrix24.
timeline.2021: Team expanded to 10 specialists. First large EDI projects.
timeline.2023: Entry into AI automation market. Launch of our own chatbot platform.
